description: A mandatory government survey used to count the population and gather demographic data for resource allocation and political representation.

schema.household_name_1: What is the full name of Person 1 (the person who owns or rents this home)?
schema.household_age_1: What is Person 1's age on April 1, 2020?
schema.household_hispanic_origin_1: Is Person 1 of Hispanic, Latino, or Spanish origin?
schema.number_of_people_in_household: How many people were living or staying in this house, apartment, or mobile home on April 1, 2020?
schema.housing_tenure: Is this house, apartment, or mobile home owned free and clear, owned with a mortgage, rented, or occupied without rent?

description: A form used to register eligible citizens to vote in federal, state, and local elections.

schema.full_legal_name: What is your full legal name (Last, First, Middle)?
schema.date_of_birth: What is your date of birth (MM/DD/YYYY)?
schema.residential_address: What is your complete residential address?
schema.mailing_address_if_different: What is your mailing address if different from residential?
schema.drivers_license_or_state_id: What is your Driver's License or State ID Number?
schema.last_4_ssn: What are the last four digits of your Social Security Number?
schema.us_citizen_status: Are you a citizen of the United States of America?
schema.eighteen_by_election: Will you be 18 years of age on or before the next election?
schema.political_party_affiliation: Do you want to register with a political party?

description: The primary application form for U.S. citizens applying for a new passport or replacing a lost/stolen one.

schema.applicant_full_name: What is your full legal name (Last, First, Middle)?
schema.date_of_birth: What is your date of birth (MM/DD/YYYY)?
schema.place_of_birth: What is your city, state, and country of birth?
schema.mailing_address: What is your primary mailing address?
schema.phone_number: What is your primary phone number?
schema.mother_full_name: What is your mother's full legal name?
schema.father_full_name: What is your father's full legal name?
schema.previous_passport_number: Do you have a previous U.S. passport book or card? If yes, provide the number.

description: A form used to apply for an original Social Security card, a replacement card, or to make changes to an existing record.

schema.full_name: What is your full legal name (First, Middle, Last)?
schema.date_of_birth: What is your date of birth (MM/DD/YYYY)?
schema.place_of_birth: What is your city, state, and country of birth?
schema.mother_maiden_name: What is your mother's full maiden name?
schema.father_full_name: What is your father's full legal name?
schema.mailing_address: What is your current mailing address?
schema.daytime_phone_number: What is a daytime phone number where you can be reached?

description: A form used to notify government agencies, postal services, or other entities of a new residential or mailing address.

schema.full_name: What is your full legal name?
schema.old_street_address: What was your old street address (including apartment/unit number)?
schema.old_city_state_zip: What was your old city, state, and ZIP code?
schema.new_street_address: What is your new street address (including apartment/unit number)?
schema.new_city_state_zip: What is your new city, state, and ZIP code?
schema.effective_date_of_change: What is the effective date of your address change (MM/DD/YYYY)?
schema.contact_phone_number: What is a current phone number to reach you?
schema.contact_email_address: What is your current email address?
schema.forwarding_period_desired: How long would you like mail to be forwarded to your new address?

description: A request made to a federal agency for access to government records under the Freedom of Information Act.

schema.requester_full_name: What is the full name of the requester?
schema.requester_organization: What is the name of your organization (if any)?
schema.requester_contact_email: What is your primary contact email address?
schema.requester_mailing_address: What is your full mailing address?
schema.agency_name: Which federal agency are you requesting records from?
schema.record_description: Please provide a detailed description of the records you are seeking.
schema.date_range_of_records: What is the specific date range for the records requested?
schema.fee_waiver_requested: Are you requesting a waiver or reduction of fees?

description: An application to register a dog with local authorities and obtain a valid license.

schema.owner_full_name: What is the full name of the dog owner?
schema.owner_phone_number: What is the owner's primary phone number?
schema.owner_residential_address: What is the owner's full residential address?
schema.dog_name: What is the name of the dog?
schema.dog_color_markings: What is the dog's color and any distinguishing markings?
schema.dog_age_birthdate: What is the dog's age or birthdate?
schema.rabies_vaccination_date: What was the date of the dog's last rabies vaccination?
schema.veterinarian_name: What is the name of the dog's primary veterinarian?

description: An application submitted to local or state authorities to obtain a license to purchase, possess, or carry a firearm.

schema.applicant_full_name: What is the applicant's full legal name?
schema.applicant_date_of_birth: What is the applicant's date of birth?
schema.applicant_social_security_number: What is the applicant's Social Security Number?
schema.applicant_current_address: What is the applicant's current residential address?
schema.applicant_drivers_license_number: What is the applicant's driver's license number and state of issue?
schema.reason_for_permit: What is your reason for requesting this permit (e.g., self-defense, sport, hunting)?
schema.prior_convictions_felonies: Have you ever been convicted of a felony or any violent misdemeanor?

schema.character_reference_1_name: What is the full name of your first character reference?
schema.character_reference_2_name: What is the full name of your second character reference?

description: An application filed by two individuals intending to marry, seeking legal authorization from the state.

schema.applicant_1_full_name: What is Applicant 1's full legal name?
schema.applicant_1_date_of_birth: What is Applicant 1's date of birth?
schema.applicant_1_place_of_birth: What is Applicant 1's place of birth (city, state, country)?
schema.applicant_1_mothers_maiden_name: What is Applicant 1's mother's full maiden name?
schema.applicant_2_full_name: What is Applicant 2's full legal name?

schema.applicant_2_place_of_birth: What is Applicant 2's place of birth (city, state, country)?
schema.applicant_2_mothers_maiden_name: What is Applicant 2's mother's full maiden name?
schema.intended_date_of_marriage: What is the intended date of marriage?
schema.intended_county_of_marriage: In which county will the marriage ceremony take place?

description: A preliminary document used to collect vital information required to complete an official death certificate.

schema.decedent_full_name: What is the full legal name of the deceased?
schema.decedent_date_of_birth: What was the decedent's date of birth?
schema.decedent_date_of_death: What was the date of death?
schema.decedent_place_of_death: What was the place of death (city, county, state)?
schema.decedent_mothers_maiden_name: What was the decedent's mother's full maiden name?
schema.decedent_social_security_number: What was the decedent's Social Security Number?
schema.cause_of_death: What was the immediate cause of death?
schema.contributing_conditions: Were there any other significant conditions contributing to death?
schema.informant_full_name: What is the full name of the informant?
schema.disposition_method: What is the method of disposition (e.g., burial, cremation, donation)?
schema.funeral_home_name: What is the name of the funeral home handling arrangements?

description: The primary federal income tax form used by U.S. taxpayers to report their income and calculate their tax liability.

schema.ssn: What is your Social Security Number?
schema.filing_status: What is your filing status (e.g., Single, Married Filing Jointly)?
schema.wages_salaries_tips: What is your total wages, salaries, and tips from Form W-2?
schema.tax_exempt_interest: What is your tax-exempt interest income?
schema.total_income: What is your total income for the year?
schema.federal_income_tax_withheld: What is the total federal income tax withheld from your income?
schema.dependents_count: How many dependents are you claiming?
schema.tax_owed_refund: Do you owe tax or are you expecting a refund?

description: An IRS form completed by employees to indicate their tax situation to employers, determining the correct amount of federal income tax to withhold from their paychecks.

schema.ssn: What is your Social Security Number?
schema.street_address: What is your current street address?
schema.city_state_zip: What is your city, state, and ZIP code?
schema.filing_status: What is your filing status (e.g., Single, Married Filing Jointly)?
schema.multiple_jobs_or_spouse_works: Do you have multiple jobs or does your spouse work?
schema.dependents_credit_amount: What is the total amount of your qualified dependent credits?
schema.other_income: What is your estimated annual amount of other income not from jobs?
schema.extra_withholding_per_paycheck: What additional amount, if any, do you want withheld from each paycheck?

description: A tax form submitted by businesses to report the amount of Value Added Tax (VAT) collected from sales and paid on purchases during a specific period.

schema.company_name: What is the name of your company?
schema.vat_registration_number: What is your VAT registration number?
schema.return_period_start_date: What is the start date of this VAT return period?
schema.return_period_end_date: What is the end date of this VAT return period?
schema.total_value_sales_ex_vat: What is the total value of sales (excluding VAT) in this period?
schema.total_output_vat: What is the total VAT charged on your sales (output VAT)?
schema.total_value_purchases_ex_vat: What is the total value of purchases (excluding VAT) in this period?
schema.total_input_vat: What is the total VAT paid on your purchases (input VAT)?
schema.net_vat_payable_refundable: What is the net VAT amount payable to or refundable from the tax authority?

description: A document travelers or shippers use to declare goods imported or exported, providing details for customs duties and security checks.

schema.flight_vessel_number: What is your flight or vessel number?
schema.country_of_residence: What is your country of permanent residence?
schema.purpose_of_visit: What is the primary purpose of your visit (e.g., Tourism, Business)?
schema.total_value_of_goods_brought_in: What is the total value of all goods you are bringing in?
schema.goods_to_declare_alcohol_tobacco_etc: Are you bringing in any goods that need to be declared (e.g., alcohol, tobacco, prohibited items)?
schema.currency_amount_over_limit: What is the total amount of currency you are carrying (if exceeding limits)?
schema.number_of_accompanying_luggage: How many pieces of accompanying luggage are you carrying?

description: A report required by financial institutions for cash transactions exceeding $10,000, filed with the Financial Crimes Enforcement Network (FinCEN) to combat money laundering.

schema.financial_institution_name: What is the name of the financial institution?
schema.transaction_date: What is the date of the transaction?
schema.total_cash_amount: What is the total amount of cash involved in the transaction?
schema.transaction_type: What type of transaction occurred (e.g., Deposit, Withdrawal, Payment)?
schema.account_number_involved: What is the account number associated with this transaction?
schema.individual_conducting_transaction_name: What is the full name of the individual conducting the transaction?
schema.individual_ssn_tin: What is the Social Security Number or Taxpayer Identification Number of the individual?
schema.individual_address: What is the individual's street address, city, state, and zip code?
schema.identifying_document_type: What type of identification document was presented (e.g., Driver's License, Passport)?
schema.identifying_document_number: What is the identification document number?

description: A standardized form used by lenders to collect financial and personal information from applicants seeking a mortgage or other major loan.

schema.applicant_name: What is the full legal name of the primary applicant?
schema.social_security_number: What is the primary applicant's Social Security Number?
schema.date_of_birth: What is the primary applicant's date of birth?
schema.current_address: What is the primary applicant's current residential address?
schema.employment_status: What is the primary applicant's current employment status?
schema.employer_name: What is the name of the primary applicant's current employer?
schema.gross_monthly_income: What is the primary applicant's gross monthly income?
schema.loan_amount_requested: What is the total loan amount being requested?
schema.property_address: What is the address of the property for which the loan is being sought?
schema.co_applicant_name: What is the full legal name of the co-applicant (if any)?

description: A small written form used to provide a bank with details about funds being added to an account, including cash and checks.

schema.account_number: To which account number should this deposit be made?
schema.account_holder_name: What is the name of the account holder?
schema.cash_amount: What is the total cash amount being deposited?
schema.checks_total: What is the total amount of checks being deposited?
schema.total_deposit_amount: What is the grand total of the deposit?
schema.depositor_signature: Please provide your signature to confirm the deposit details.

description: A form used to initiate an electronic transfer of funds from one bank account to another, often internationally, requiring detailed recipient banking information.

schema.sender_account_number: What is your account number from which funds will be sent?
schema.sender_name: What is your full legal name?
schema.recipient_name: What is the full legal name of the recipient?
schema.recipient_bank_name: What is the full name of the recipient's bank?
schema.recipient_account_number: What is the recipient's account number?
schema.recipient_swift_bic: What is the SWIFT/BIC code for the recipient's bank?
schema.amount_to_transfer: What is the exact amount to be transferred?
schema.currency: What currency should the transfer be made in?
schema.purpose_of_transfer: What is the purpose of this wire transfer?
schema.request_date: What is today's date for this request?

description: A legal document used to name one or more individuals or entities who will receive assets from an account, policy, or trust upon the owner's death.

schema.account_holder_name: What is the full legal name of the account holder/participant?
schema.account_policy_number: What is the account or policy number?
schema.primary_beneficiary_name: What is the full legal name of the primary beneficiary?
schema.primary_beneficiary_relationship: What is the relationship of the primary beneficiary to the account holder?
schema.primary_beneficiary_percentage: What percentage of the assets should go to the primary beneficiary?
schema.contingent_beneficiary_name: What is the full legal name of the contingent beneficiary (if any)?
schema.contingent_beneficiary_relationship: What is the relationship of the contingent beneficiary to the account holder?
schema.contingent_beneficiary_percentage: What percentage of the assets should go to the contingent beneficiary (if primary is deceased)?
schema.designation_date: What is today's date of this designation?
schema.account_holder_signature: Please provide your signature to authorize this designation.

description: A document submitted by an employee to request repayment for out-of-pocket expenses incurred on behalf of the company during business activities.

schema.employee_name: What is the full name of the employee submitting this request?
schema.employee_id: What is the employee's ID number?
schema.department: In which department does the employee work?
schema.expense_date: What was the date the expense was incurred?
schema.expense_type: What type of expense was this (e.g., travel, meals, supplies)?
schema.expense_description: Please provide a brief description of the expense.
schema.amount_incurred: What was the total amount of the expense?
schema.receipt_attached: Was a receipt for this expense attached? (Yes/No)
schema.total_amount_claimed: What is the total amount being claimed for reimbursement?
schema.manager_approval_signature: Please provide the signature of the approving manager.

description: This form collects essential personal, medical, and insurance information for new patients.

schema.full_name: What is your full legal name?
schema.date_of_birth: What is your date of birth?

schema.phone_number: What is your primary phone number?
schema.emergency_contact_name: Who should we contact in case of an emergency?
schema.emergency_contact_relationship: What is their relationship to you?
schema.primary_care_physician: Who is your primary care physician?
schema.current_medications: Please list all current medications, including dosage.
schema.allergies: Do you have any known allergies to medications, food, or other substances?

description: This form authorizes the release of your protected health information to specified individuals or entities.

schema.patient_full_name: What is the patient's full legal name?

schema.information_to_be_released: What specific health information are you authorizing to be released?
schema.purpose_of_disclosure: What is the purpose of this disclosure?
schema.recipient_full_name: To whom should the information be released (Full Name)?
schema.recipient_relationship: What is their relationship to the patient?
schema.recipient_address: What is the recipient's full address?
schema.recipient_phone: What is the recipient's phone number?
schema.expiration_date: This authorization expires on (Date or Event):

description: This document confirms the patient's informed consent for a specified surgical procedure after understanding its risks and benefits.

schema.description_of_procedure: Brief description of the procedure to be performed:
schema.potential_risks: Potential risks and complications of the procedure:
schema.alternatives_to_surgery: Known alternatives to this surgical procedure:
schema.anesthesia_risks: Risks associated with the type of anesthesia planned:
schema.questions_answered: Have all your questions about the procedure been answered to your satisfaction?

description: This legally binding order instructs medical professionals not to perform cardiopulmonary resuscitation (CPR) in case of cardiac arrest.

schema.physician_statement: I, the undersigned physician, certify that this order has been discussed with the patient or their authorized decision-maker.
schema.patient_wishes: The patient (or authorized decision-maker) has expressed the wish NOT to receive cardiopulmonary resuscitation (CPR).
schema.effective_date: This DNR order is effective as of:

description: This screening tool assesses the severity of depression over the last two weeks by asking about common symptoms.

schema.little_interest_pleasure: Little interest or pleasure in doing things?
schema.sleep_trouble: Trouble falling or staying asleep, or sleeping too much?
schema.feeling_tired_low_energy: Feeling tired or having little energy?
schema.feeling_bad_about_self: Feeling bad about yourself - or that you are a failure or have let yourself or your family down?
schema.trouble_concentrating: Trouble concentrating on things, such as reading the newspaper or watching television?
schema.slow_fast_movement: Moving or speaking so slowly that other people could have noticed? Or the opposite - being so fidgety or restless that you have been moving around a lot more than usual?
schema.thoughts_of_self_harm: Thoughts that you would be better off dead, or of hurting yourself in some way?

description: A document used to track an individual's vaccination history, including vaccine name, date, and provider.

description: A formal document used to record details of any unexpected event or occurrence that may have caused harm or has the potential to cause harm within a hospital setting.

description: A document used to formally request official or unofficial academic transcripts from an educational institution.

description: A legal document developed for each public school child who needs special education, outlining their educational goals, services, and accommodations.

schema.student_full_name: What is the student's full legal name?

description: A form used by students to formally add a course to or drop a course from their academic schedule during a specific period.

description: This form is used by students to formally submit their completed thesis or dissertation for academic review and university archiving.

schema.phone_number: What is your primary phone number?

schema.donation_frequency: Will this be a one-time donation or a recurring pledge? (One-time/Recurring)
schema.designation_preference: Where would you like your donation to be directed? (e.g., Scholarship Fund, Specific Department, General Fund)
schema.acknowledgement_name: How would you like your name to appear in donor acknowledgments?
schema.anonymous_donation: Would you prefer your donation to be anonymous? (Yes/No)
schema.date_of_pledge: What is the date of this pledge?

description: Used by employers to collect information from candidates interested in a specific position within the company.

schema.full_name: What is your full legal name?
schema.contact_phone: What is your primary contact phone number?
schema.position_applied_for: Which position are you applying for?
schema.desired_salary: What is your desired annual salary?
schema.previous_employer: What was your most recent employer?
schema.employment_start_date: What was your start date with your most recent employer?
schema.education_level: What is your highest level of education attained?
schema.available_start_date: What is your earliest available start date if hired?

description: A U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services form used to verify the identity and employment authorization of individuals hired for employment in the United States.

schema.employee_name: What is the employee's full legal name?
schema.date_of_birth: What is the employee's date of birth?
schema.social_security_number: What is the employee's Social Security Number?
schema.citizenship_status: Which of the following describes the employee's citizenship or immigration status?
schema.list_a_document_title: What is the title of the List A document presented?
schema.list_a_document_number: What is the document number for the List A document?
schema.list_a_expiration_date: What is the expiration date of the List A document?
schema.employer_name: What is the full name of the employer?
schema.date_hired: What is the employee's first day of employment?

description: A legal contract that establishes a confidential relationship between two or more parties, protecting sensitive information from being shared.

schema.disclosing_party_name: What is the full legal name of the Disclosing Party?
schema.receiving_party_name: What is the full legal name of the Receiving Party?
schema.effective_date: What is the effective date of this agreement?
schema.definition_of_confidential_info: Please describe the types of information considered confidential under this agreement.
schema.term_of_agreement_months: How many months will the confidentiality obligations remain in effect?
schema.governing_law_state: Which state's laws will govern this agreement?

description: A formal assessment of an employee's work performance and overall contribution to the company over a specific period.

schema.employee_name: What is the full name of the employee being reviewed?
schema.review_period_start: What is the start date of the review period?
schema.review_period_end: What is the end date of the review period?
schema.reviewer_name: What is the full name of the reviewer?
schema.key_strengths: Describe the employee's key strengths and notable accomplishments during this period.
schema.areas_for_development: Identify specific areas where the employee could improve or develop new skills.
schema.overall_rating: What is the overall performance rating for the employee?
schema.employee_comments: Please provide any comments regarding this performance review.

description: A document used to record the amount of time an employee has worked, typically for payroll and project tracking purposes.

schema.employee_name: What is the full name of the employee?
schema.pay_period_start_date: What is the start date of this pay period?
schema.pay_period_end_date: What is the end date of this pay period?
schema.date_worked: On which date did the employee perform work?
schema.time_in: What time did the employee begin work?
schema.time_out: What time did the employee finish work?
schema.lunch_break_duration_minutes: How many minutes was the unpaid lunch break?
schema.total_regular_hours: What are the total regular hours worked for this period?
schema.total_overtime_hours: What are the total overtime hours worked for this period?

description: Used by employees to formally request time off from work for various reasons such as vacation, sick leave, or personal time.

schema.employee_name: What is the employee's full name?
schema.employee_id: What is the employee's ID number?
schema.department: What department does the employee work in?
schema.leave_type: What type of leave is being requested (e.g., Vacation, Sick, Personal, FMLA)?
schema.start_date: What is the first day of leave?
schema.end_date: What is the last day of leave?
schema.total_hours_requested: How many total hours of leave are being requested?
schema.reason_for_leave: Please briefly state the reason for this leave request.

description: Completed with departing employees to gather feedback on their employment experience and reasons for leaving.

schema.employee_name: What is the departing employee's full name?
schema.employee_id: What is the employee's ID number?
schema.position_held: What was the employee's last position held?
schema.last_day_of_employment: What is the employee's last day of employment?
schema.reason_for_leaving: What is the primary reason for your departure from the company?
schema.positive_aspects: What did you like most about working for this company?
schema.negative_aspects: What did you like least about working for this company?
schema.suggestions_for_improvement: Do you have any suggestions for improving the company or work environment?
schema.would_recommend_company: Would you recommend this company as a good place to work?

description: An official document used to report work-related injuries, illnesses, or fatalities as required by OSHA regulations.

schema.employee_name: What is the full name of the injured or ill employee?
schema.job_title: What is the employee's job title?
schema.date_of_injury_illness: What was the date of the injury or illness?
schema.time_of_injury_illness: What was the time of the injury or illness?
schema.location_of_incident: Where on the employer's premises or at what location did the incident occur?
schema.how_injury_occurred: Describe how the injury or illness occurred. Be specific.
schema.nature_of_injury_illness: What was the nature of the injury or illness (e.g., sprain, fracture, cut, dermatitis)?
schema.part_of_body_affected: What part(s) of the body were affected?
schema.treatment_given: Was medical treatment provided, and if so, what type and by whom?
schema.witness_name: What is the name(s) of any witness(es)?

description: Authorizes an employer to deposit an employee's wages directly into a specified bank account.

schema.employee_name: What is the employee's full name?
schema.employee_id: What is the employee's ID number?
schema.bank_name: What is the name of your bank?
schema.bank_account_type: Is this a checking or savings account?
schema.bank_account_number: What is your bank account number?
schema.bank_routing_number: What is your bank's routing number (9 digits)?
schema.deposit_amount_type: Do you want to deposit a fixed amount or a percentage of your net pay?
schema.amount_to_deposit: If fixed amount, what amount? If percentage, what percentage?

description: Provides a formal channel for employees to report incidents of sexual harassment in the workplace for investigation.

schema.complainant_department: What department do you work in?
schema.date_of_incident: When did the most recent incident occur?
schema.time_of_incident: Approximately what time did the incident occur?
schema.location_of_incident: Where did the incident(s) take place?
schema.alleged_harasser_name: What is the full name of the person(s) you are accusing of harassment?
schema.description_of_incident: Please describe the incident(s) in detail, including dates, times, and exact statements or actions.
schema.witness_names: Were there any witnesses to the incident(s)? If so, please list their names.
schema.previous_complaints: Have you reported this or similar incidents before? If so, when and to whom?

description: A legal document issued by a court to notify a person that a lawsuit has been filed against them and they must appear in court or respond by a certain date.

schema.case_number: What is the official case number for this legal action?
schema.court_name: What is the name of the court issuing this summons?
schema.plaintiff_name: What is the full legal name of the plaintiff(s)?
schema.defendant_name: What is the full legal name of the defendant(s) being summoned?
schema.date_issued: What is the date this summons was officially issued?
schema.deadline_to_respond: By what date must the defendant respond to this summons?
schema.type_of_action: What is the primary type of legal action (e.g., Civil, Family, Small Claims)?
schema.court_address: What is the full address of the court where the case will be heard?

description: A legal document granting one person (the agent) the authority to act on behalf of another person (the principal) in legal or financial matters.

schema.principal_full_name: What is the full legal name of the principal?
schema.principal_address: What is the principal's current residential address?
schema.agent_full_name: What is the full legal name of the agent (attorney-in-fact)?
schema.agent_address: What is the agent's current residential address?
schema.effective_date_of_poa: When will this Power of Attorney become effective?
schema.scope_of_authority: What specific powers are being granted to the agent (e.g., financial, medical, general, limited)?
schema.duration_of_poa: Will this Power of Attorney be durable, or does it have a specific end date or condition?
schema.successor_agent_name: If applicable, what is the full legal name of the successor agent?
schema.witness_1_name: What is the full name of the first witness?

description: A legal document that specifies how a person's assets and estate should be managed and distributed after their death.

schema.testator_full_name: What is the full legal name of the person making this will (testator)?
schema.testator_address: What is the testator's current residential address?
schema.executor_full_name: What is the full legal name of the person appointed as executor of this will?
schema.executor_address: What is the executor's current residential address?
schema.beneficiary_names_relationships: List the full names of beneficiaries and their relationship to the testator.
schema.specific_bequests_details: Describe any specific assets or items to be given to particular individuals.
schema.residuary_estate_instructions: How should the remainder of the estate (residuary estate) be distributed?
schema.guardian_for_minor_children: If applicable, who is appointed as guardian for any minor children?
schema.date_of_will_execution: What is the date this Last Will and Testament is being executed?
schema.witness_1_name: What is the full name of the first witness to this will?

description: A legal document filed with a court to formally request the dissolution of a marriage.

schema.petitioner_full_name: What is the full legal name of the spouse filing this petition (Petitioner)?
schema.petitioner_address: What is the Petitioner's current residential address?
schema.respondent_full_name: What is the full legal name of the other spouse (Respondent)?
schema.respondent_address: What is the Respondent's current residential address?
schema.date_of_marriage: What is the official date of your marriage?
schema.date_of_separation: What is the approximate date you and your spouse separated?
schema.grounds_for_divorce: What are the legal grounds for seeking this divorce (e.g., irreconcilable differences, adultery)?
schema.minor_children_details: Provide the names and dates of birth for all minor children of the marriage.
schema.requested_relief: What relief are you requesting from the court (e.g., child custody, child support, spousal support, property division)?
schema.court_jurisdiction: Which court has jurisdiction over this divorce proceeding?

description: A form submitted to a government agency to officially register a creative work, establishing legal ownership and protection.

schema.title_of_work: What is the complete title of the work being registered?
schema.type_of_work: What type of work is this (e.g., literary, musical, visual art, software, dramatic)?
schema.author_full_name: What is the full legal name of the author(s)?
schema.author_nationality: What is the nationality or domicile of the author(s)?
schema.year_of_creation: What is the year in which the creation of the work was completed?
schema.date_of_first_publication: If published, what is the exact date of first publication?
schema.claimant_full_name: What is the full legal name of the copyright claimant(s)?
schema.claimant_address: What is the claimant's mailing address?
schema.description_of_work: Provide a brief description of the work's content.
schema.rights_permissions_contact: What is the name and contact information for rights and permissions?

description: A formal document issued by a landlord to a tenant requesting them to vacate the rental property.

schema.landlord_name: What is the full name of the landlord or property owner?
schema.tenant_name: What is the full name of the tenant(s) being evicted?
schema.property_address: What is the full address of the rental property?
schema.reason_for_eviction: What is the specific legal reason for this eviction?
schema.notice_period_days: How many days notice is being provided to vacate the premises?
schema.amount_due_if_any: What is the total amount of rent or other charges currently due, if applicable?
schema.lease_agreement_date: What is the date the current lease agreement was signed?
schema.date_issued: What is the date this eviction notice is being issued?

description: A written statement confirmed by oath or affirmation, for use as evidence in court.

schema.affiant_full_name: What is the full legal name of the affiant (person making the statement)?
schema.affiant_address: What is the current residential address of the affiant?
schema.case_name_number: What is the name and case number of the legal proceeding this affidavit relates to?
schema.statement_of_facts: Please provide a clear and concise statement of the facts you wish to attest to under oath.
schema.date_of_statement: What is the date this statement is being made?
schema.signature_of_affiant: Digital signature or confirmation that the affiant understands their signature is required.
schema.notary_public_name: What is the full name of the Notary Public witnessing this affidavit?
schema.notary_commission_expiration: What is the expiration date of the Notary Public's commission?

description: A document used in criminal proceedings for a defendant to formally enter a plea to the charges.

schema.defendant_full_name: What is the full legal name of the defendant?
schema.case_number: What is the assigned court case number for this matter?
schema.court_name: What is the name of the court where this plea is being entered?
schema.charges_filed: Please list all specific charges filed against the defendant.
schema.plea_selection: What is the defendant's plea (Guilty, Not Guilty, Nolo Contendere/No Contest)?
schema.attorney_full_name: What is the full name of the defendant's legal counsel?
schema.date_of_plea: What is the date this plea is being formally entered?
schema.defendant_signature_confirmation: Confirmation that the defendant understands and agrees to the plea being entered.

description: A legal request to the court seeking protection from harm or harassment by another individual.

schema.applicant_full_name: What is the full legal name of the person seeking the restraining order?
schema.applicant_address: What is the current residential address of the applicant?
schema.respondent_full_name: What is the full legal name of the person against whom the order is sought?
schema.respondent_address: What is the last known address of the respondent?
schema.relationship_to_respondent: What is your relationship to the respondent (e.g., spouse, ex-partner, neighbor)?
schema.reason_for_request: What are the specific reasons you are requesting a restraining order (e.g., domestic violence, harassment, threats)?
schema.description_of_incidents: Please describe the most recent incidents of harm, threats, or harassment, including dates.
schema.desired_orders: What specific actions do you want the court to order the respondent to do or not do?
schema.date_of_application: What is the date this application is being submitted?

description: A legal document filed with a state to establish a corporation as a legal entity.

schema.corporate_name: What is the exact legal name of the corporation?
schema.purpose_of_corporation: What is the primary business purpose of the corporation?
schema.registered_agent_name: What is the full legal name of the registered agent?
schema.registered_agent_address: What is the street address of the registered office (must be a physical address)?
schema.number_of_shares_authorized: What is the total number of shares of stock the corporation is authorized to issue?
schema.class_of_shares: What are the classes of shares, if any, and their respective par value?
schema.incorporator_full_name: What is the full legal name of the incorporator?
schema.incorporator_address: What is the address of the incorporator?
schema.date_of_filing: What is the date these Articles of Incorporation are being filed?

description: A legally binding contract outlining the terms and conditions between a landlord and tenant for the rental of a residential property.

schema.landlord_name: What is the full name of the landlord?
schema.tenant_names: What are the full names of all tenants?
schema.property_address: What is the full address of the leased property?
schema.lease_term_start_date: What is the start date of the lease term?
schema.lease_term_end_date: What is the end date of the lease term?
schema.monthly_rent_amount: What is the agreed-upon monthly rent amount?
schema.security_deposit_amount: What is the security deposit amount?
schema.pet_policy: Are pets allowed? If so, what are the conditions and fees?
schema.utilities_included: Which utilities are included in the rent?

description: A document completed by a seller disclosing known defects or issues with a property to potential buyers.

schema.property_address: What is the full address of the property?
schema.seller_name: What is the full name of the seller?
schema.roof_condition: Are there any known issues with the roof (e.g., leaks, age)?
schema.foundation_issues: Are there any known foundation or structural defects?
schema.plumbing_problems: Have there been any significant plumbing leaks or issues?
schema.electrical_issues: Are there any known electrical problems or past issues?
schema.hvac_condition: What is the current condition and age of the HVAC system?
schema.pest_infestations: Has the property ever had issues with pests (e.g., termites, rodents)?
schema.environmental_hazards: Are there any known environmental hazards (e.g., lead paint, asbestos, radon)?
schema.water_damage: Has the property experienced any significant water damage from flooding or leaks?

description: A formal request submitted to a local government agency to obtain authorization for construction or renovation work.

schema.property_address: What is the full address of the property where work will be performed?
schema.applicant_name: What is the full name of the applicant?
schema.applicant_contact_phone: What is the applicant's contact phone number?
schema.type_of_work: What type of work is being performed (e.g., new construction, addition, renovation, demolition)?
schema.project_description: Provide a detailed description of the proposed work.
schema.estimated_project_cost: What is the estimated cost of the project?
schema.contractor_license_number: What is the primary contractor's license number (if applicable)?
schema.proposed_start_date: What is the anticipated start date for the project?
schema.existing_zoning_classification: What is the existing zoning classification for the property?

description: A comprehensive document detailing the condition of a residential property, identifying defects and potential concerns for buyers.

schema.inspection_date: What date was the inspection performed?
schema.property_address: What is the full address of the inspected property?
schema.inspector_name: What is the full name of the home inspector?
schema.roofing_system_condition: Describe the condition of the roofing system (e.g., type, age, defects).
schema.exterior_components_condition: Describe the condition of exterior components (e.g., siding, windows, doors, foundation visible parts).
schema.foundation_and_structure_condition: Describe the condition of the foundation and structural components.
schema.plumbing_system_condition: Describe the condition of the plumbing system (e.g., water heater, pipes, fixtures).
schema.electrical_system_condition: Describe the condition of the electrical system (e.g., panel, wiring, outlets).
schema.hvac_system_condition: Describe the condition of the HVAC system (e.g., furnace, AC, ductwork).
schema.attic_insulation_condition: Describe the condition and type of attic insulation.

description: A legal claim placed on real property by a contractor, subcontractor, or supplier to secure payment for labor or materials provided for improvements.

schema.claimant_name: What is the full name of the party filing the lien (Claimant)?
schema.claimant_address: What is the mailing address of the Claimant?
schema.property_owner_name: What is the full name of the property owner?
schema.property_address: What is the full address of the property where the work was performed?
schema.description_of_work_materials: Provide a detailed description of the labor or materials provided.
schema.date_work_completed_or_last_furnished: What is the date the work was completed or materials last furnished?
schema.amount_claimed: What is the total monetary amount being claimed?
schema.date_lien_filed: What is the date this lien is being filed?
schema.notice_of_intent_to_lien_sent_date: What date was the Notice of Intent to Lien (if required) sent?

description: An application used to request a renters insurance policy, providing coverage for personal belongings and liability.

schema.applicant_full_name: What is the full name of the primary applicant?
schema.current_address: What is your current full residential address?
schema.contact_phone: What is your primary contact phone number?
schema.policy_start_date: What date would you like the policy to begin?
schema.estimated_personal_property_value: What is the estimated total value of your personal property?
schema.number_of_occupants: How many individuals will reside in the insured unit?
schema.pet_ownership: Do you own any pets? If yes, please specify type and breed.

description: A formal notice sent to a homeowner detailing a violation of Homeowners Association rules and the required corrective action.

schema.homeowner_name: What is the full name of the homeowner?
schema.property_address: What is the property address where the violation occurred?
schema.violation_date: What date was the violation observed?
schema.violation_type: What type of violation has occurred (e.g., landscaping, parking, exterior maintenance)?
schema.violation_description: Please provide a detailed description of the violation.
schema.hoa_rule_violated: Which specific HOA rule, bylaw, or CC&R article was violated?
schema.required_corrective_action: What specific action is required to correct the violation?
schema.correction_deadline: By what date must the violation be corrected?
schema.potential_fines: Are there potential fines or penalties associated with this violation? If yes, please specify.

description: A formal request to a local planning department to deviate from current zoning regulations due to unique property circumstances.

schema.applicant_name_organization: What is the full name or organization name of the applicant?
schema.property_address_parcel_number: What is the property address and parcel number (APN)?
schema.current_zoning_district: What is the current zoning district classification for the property?
schema.proposed_project_description: Provide a detailed description of the proposed project requiring the variance.
schema.specific_ordinance_to_vary: Which specific zoning ordinance or regulation is requested to be varied?
schema.reason_for_variance: Explain the unique circumstances or hardship that necessitates this variance.
schema.impact_on_adjacent_properties: Describe the potential impact of the variance on adjacent properties and the neighborhood.
schema.date_of_application: What is the date of this application?
schema.contact_information: What is the primary contact phone and email for the applicant?

description: A detailed document used by landlords and tenants to record the condition of a property at the beginning and end of a lease term.

schema.property_address: What is the full address of the property?
schema.tenant_names: What are the full names of all tenants?
schema.move_in_date: What is the official move-in date?
schema.move_out_date: What is the official move-out date (if applicable)?
schema.living_room_condition: Describe the condition of the living room (walls, floor, windows, fixtures).
schema.kitchen_condition: Describe the condition of the kitchen (appliances, counters, cabinets, sink).
schema.bathroom_condition: Describe the condition of the bathroom(s) (fixtures, tiles, grout, vanity).
schema.bedroom_condition: Describe the condition of each bedroom (walls, floor, closets, windows).
schema.outdoor_areas_condition: Describe the condition of outdoor areas (yard, patio, balcony, garage).
schema.notes_damages_photos: Are there any specific notes, existing damages, or photos taken at this time?

description: A legal document proving ownership of a property, detailing its legal description and transfer of title.

schema.grantor_names: What are the full legal names of the Grantor(s) (seller)?
schema.grantee_names: What are the full legal names of the Grantee(s) (buyer)?
schema.property_legal_description: Provide the full legal description of the property (lot, block, subdivision, APN).
schema.property_street_address: What is the commonly known street address of the property?
schema.consideration_amount: What is the monetary consideration (sale price) for this transfer?
schema.date_of_execution: What is the date on which this deed was executed?
schema.county_and_state: In which County and State is the property located?
schema.recording_information: Provide the recording information (book, page, or instrument number) if already recorded.
schema.witness_names: What are the names of any witnesses to the signing?
schema.notary_public_information: Provide the Notary Public's name, commission number, and expiration date.

description: Application for official permission to enter and stay in a foreign country for a specified period.

schema.full_name: What is your full legal name?
schema.date_of_birth: What is your date of birth?
schema.passport_number: What is your valid passport number?
schema.nationality: What is your country of nationality?
schema.purpose_of_visit: What is the primary purpose of your visit?
schema.intended_date_of_arrival: What is your intended date of arrival?
schema.intended_date_of_departure: What is your intended date of departure?
schema.address_in_home_country: What is your full residential address in your home country?
schema.contact_number: What is your primary contact phone number?

description: A document filed by a pilot or flight dispatcher with the air traffic control service providing details of an intended flight.

schema.aircraft_identification: What is the aircraft identification (e.g., callsign or registration)?
schema.aircraft_type: What is the aircraft type (e.g., B738, C172)?
schema.departure_aerodrome: What is the ICAO code for the departure aerodrome?
schema.destination_aerodrome: What is the ICAO code for the destination aerodrome?
schema.estimated_off_block_time: What is the estimated off-block time (EOBT)?
schema.cruising_speed: What is the true airspeed for the cruising portion of the flight?
schema.cruising_level: What is the planned cruising level (e.g., FL350, 5000ft)?
schema.route: What is the planned route of flight?
schema.total_estimated_elapsed_time: What is the total estimated elapsed time (EET) for the flight?
schema.number_of_persons_on_board: How many persons are expected to be on board (including crew)?

description: A legal document issued by a carrier to a shipper, detailing the type, quantity, and destination of goods being shipped.

schema.shipper_name: What is the full name of the shipper?
schema.consignee_name: What is the full name of the consignee?
schema.carrier_name: What is the full name of the carrier?
schema.bill_of_lading_number: What is the unique Bill of Lading number?
schema.date_of_shipment: What is the date of shipment?
schema.origin_port_address: What is the origin port or full address?
schema.destination_port_address: What is the destination port or full address?
schema.description_of_goods: Provide a detailed description of the goods being shipped.
schema.quantity: What is the total quantity of goods (e.g., number of cartons, units)?
schema.weight_kg_lb: What is the total weight of the goods, including units (e.g., 500 kg, 1100 lb)?

description: A legal document used to transfer ownership of a motor vehicle from one party to another.

schema.seller_full_name: What is the seller's full legal name?

schema.odometer_reading: What is the current odometer reading?
schema.sale_price: What is the agreed-upon sale price of the vehicle?

description: An official notice issued by a law enforcement officer for a violation of traffic laws.

schema.citation_number: What is the unique citation number?

schema.date_of_violation: What was the date of the violation?
schema.time_of_violation: What was the time of the violation?
schema.location_of_violation: What was the street address or nearest intersection of the violation?

schema.violation_description: What is the specific traffic violation committed?
schema.fine_amount: What is the amount of the fine?
schema.court_date: What is the scheduled court date, if applicable?

description: A form used by airline passengers to report lost luggage and initiate a search or compensation process.

schema.passenger_full_name: What is the full name of the passenger?
schema.date_of_travel: What was your date of travel?
schema.baggage_tag_number: What is your baggage tag number?
schema.baggage_description: Describe your lost baggage (color, brand, size, material).
schema.contents_description: List the main contents of your lost baggage.
schema.contact_phone_number: What is your primary contact phone number?

description: An application submitted to obtain an official translation of a national driving license, valid for driving in foreign countries.

schema.applicant_full_name: What is the applicant's full legal name?
schema.date_of_birth: What is your date of birth?
schema.mailing_address: What is your current mailing address?
schema.national_license_country: Which country issued your national driving license?
schema.national_license_number: What is your national driving license number?
schema.national_license_expiration: What is the expiration date of your national driving license?
schema.countries_of_intended_travel: List the countries where you intend to use the IDP.
schema.applicant_signature_date: What is the date of your signature?

description: A document required for the transportation of hazardous materials, detailing the substance, quantity, and emergency procedures.

schema.shipper_name: What is the name of the shipper?
schema.consignee_name: What is the name of the consignee?
schema.hazardous_material_proper_shipping_name: What is the proper shipping name of the hazardous material?
schema.un_na_number: What is the UN/NA number for the material?
schema.hazard_class_division: What is the hazard class or division of the material?
schema.packing_group: What is the packing group (I, II, or III)?
schema.quantity_type_packaging: What is the quantity and type of packaging?
schema.emergency_contact_number: What is the 24-hour emergency contact phone number?
schema.shipper_certification_signature: Please provide the shipper's certification signature.
schema.date_of_shipment: What is the date of shipment?

description: A medical examination report required for commercial driver's license holders to certify their physical fitness to operate commercial motor vehicles.

schema.driver_full_name: What is the driver's full legal name?
schema.driver_date_of_birth: What is the driver's date of birth?
schema.cdl_number: What is the driver's Commercial Driver's License (CDL) number?
schema.examination_date: What is the date of this medical examination?
schema.medical_examiner_name: What is the full name of the medical examiner?
schema.vision_acuity_left_eye: What is the uncorrected/corrected vision acuity for the left eye?
schema.vision_acuity_right_eye: What is the uncorrected/corrected vision acuity for the right eye?
schema.blood_pressure_reading: What is the driver's blood pressure reading (systolic/diastolic)?
schema.urinalysis_results: What are the urinalysis results (e.g., glucose, protein)?
schema.medical_examiner_certification: Does the medical examiner certify the driver as medically qualified (Yes/No)?

description: A legal contract between a rental company and a customer, outlining the terms and conditions for renting a vehicle.

schema.renter_full_name: What is the full name of the primary renter?
schema.drivers_license_number: What is the renter's driver's license number?
schema.drivers_license_issuing_state_country: What state or country issued the driver's license?
schema.rental_start_date_time: What is the scheduled rental start date and time?
schema.rental_end_date_time: What is the scheduled rental end date and time?
schema.vehicle_make_model: What is the make and model of the rented vehicle?
schema.vehicle_license_plate: What is the license plate number of the rented vehicle?
schema.initial_odometer_reading: What is the initial odometer reading of the vehicle?
schema.daily_rental_rate: What is the agreed-upon daily rental rate?

description: A form used to report software defects or unexpected behavior encountered by users.

schema.bug_title: Summarize the issue in a few words.
schema.description: Provide a detailed description of the bug, including what you expected to happen and what actually happened.
schema.steps_to_reproduce: List the exact steps to reproduce the bug.
schema.browser_os: What browser and operating system were you using?
schema.severity: How severe is this bug? (e.g., Critical, Major, Minor, Cosmetic)
schema.attachments: Upload any screenshots, videos, or logs related to the bug.
schema.reported_by: What is your name or user ID?

description: A form for registering a new internet domain name and providing registrant details.

schema.desired_domain_name: What is the domain name you wish to register? (e.g., example.com)
schema.registration_period: For how many years do you want to register the domain?
schema.registrant_first_name: What is the registrant's first name?
schema.registrant_last_name: What is the registrant's last name?
schema.registrant_email: What is the registrant's email address?
schema.registrant_phone: What is the registrant's phone number?
schema.registrant_address: What is the registrant's full street address?

description: A form to request a Secure Socket Layer (SSL) certificate for a website to enable encrypted communication.

schema.domain_name: What is the fully qualified domain name for which the SSL certificate is requested?
schema.organization_name: What is the full legal name of your organization?
schema.organization_unit: What is your organizational unit? (e.g., IT, Sales)
schema.city_state: What is your organization's city and state/province?
schema.admin_contact_email: What is the email address for the administrative contact?
schema.technical_contact_email: What is the email address for the technical contact?
schema.certificate_type: What type of certificate do you need? (e.g., Domain Validated, Organization Validated, Extended Validation)

description: A form used to regain access to an online account when login credentials are lost or forgotten.

schema.registered_email: What email address was associated with your account?
schema.registered_username: What was your username, if applicable?
schema.full_name: What is the full name registered to the account?
schema.last_known_password: What was the last password you remember using?
schema.approximate_creation_date: Approximately when was the account created?
schema.recent_activity: Describe any recent activity on your account (e.g., last login, purchases, posts).
schema.recovery_email: Provide an alternative email address where we can send recovery instructions.

description: A legal notice sent to an online service provider requesting the removal of infringing copyrighted material.

schema.copyright_holder_name: What is the full legal name of the copyright holder?
schema.authorized_agent_name: If applicable, what is the full name of the authorized agent?
schema.copyright_holder_email: What is the email address of the copyright holder or authorized agent?
schema.infringing_material_url: What is the URL(s) where the infringing material is located?
schema.original_work_description: Provide a description of the original copyrighted work.
schema.original_work_url: What is the URL(s) where the original copyrighted work can be found?
schema.statement_of_good_faith: Do you confirm a good faith belief that the use of the material in the manner complained of is not authorized by the copyright owner, its agent, or the law?
schema.statement_of_accuracy: Do you confirm that the information in this notification is accurate, and under penalty of perjury, that you are the copyright owner or authorized to act on behalf of the owner of an exclusive right that is allegedly infringed?

description: Collect feedback from beta testers regarding new features, usability, and bug reports for a pre-release product.

schema.product_version: Which version of the product are you testing?
schema.feature_tested: Which specific feature or component are you providing feedback on?
schema.overall_satisfaction: How would you rate your overall satisfaction with this version (1-5, 5 being excellent)?
schema.usability_feedback: Please describe any usability issues or suggestions for improvement.
schema.bug_description: Did you encounter any bugs? If so, please describe them in detail (steps to reproduce, expected vs. actual behavior).
schema.additional_comments: Do you have any additional comments or suggestions?

description: Request an API key for accessing platform services, detailing the intended use and application information.

schema.developer_name: What is your full name or company name?
schema.developer_email: What is your contact email address?
schema.application_name: What is the name of your application?
schema.application_url: What is the URL of your application (if applicable)?
schema.intended_use: Briefly describe how you intend to use our API.
schema.data_access_required: What specific API endpoints or data types do you require access to?
schema.expected_volume: What is your estimated API request volume per day/month?
schema.terms_accepted: Do you accept our API Terms of Service?

description: Allow individuals to exercise their rights under GDPR, such as access, rectification, or erasure of their personal data.

schema.email_address: What is your primary email address associated with our services?
schema.request_type: What type of data subject request are you making? (e.g., Access, Rectification, Erasure, Restriction, Portability, Objection)
schema.request_details: Please provide specific details about your request (e.g., which data you want to access, what needs to be rectified, what data to erase).
schema.supporting_documents: Please upload any supporting documents for identity verification (optional).
schema.date_of_request: What is the date of this request?
schema.declaration: I declare that the information provided is accurate and that I am the data subject or authorized to act on their behalf.

description: Document routine or emergency maintenance activities performed on servers, including date, actions, and outcomes.

schema.maintenance_date: What is the date of the maintenance?
schema.server_id: Which server was maintained (e.g., SRV-WEB-01, DB-PROD-03)?
schema.maintenance_type: What type of maintenance was performed (e.g., Routine, Emergency, Upgrade, Patching)?
schema.actions_taken: Describe the specific actions taken during maintenance.
schema.outcome: What was the outcome of the maintenance (e.g., Successful, Partial Success, Failed, Issues Remaining)?
schema.downtime_start: What was the start time of any service downtime (if applicable)?
schema.downtime_end: What was the end time of any service downtime (if applicable)?
schema.notes_issues: Any additional notes or issues encountered?

description: Guide users through the process of setting up or modifying their two-factor authentication method for enhanced account security.

schema.user_id: What is your user ID or username?
schema.email_on_file: What is the email address associated with your account?
schema.current_2fa_status: What is your current 2FA status (e.g., Not configured, Enabled via App, Enabled via SMS)?
schema.desired_2fa_method: Which 2FA method would you like to set up or change to? (e.g., Authenticator App, SMS, Security Key)
schema.phone_number_for_sms: If choosing SMS, please provide your phone number (including country code).
schema.backup_codes_generated: Have you generated and securely stored your backup codes?
schema.confirmation_checkbox: I understand that enabling 2FA will require a second verification step upon login.
schema.security_question_answer: To confirm your identity, please answer your security question: 'What was the name of your first pet?'

description: An official document certifying that an individual has undergone the religious rite of baptism.

schema.person_full_name: What is the full name of the baptized individual?
schema.person_date_of_birth: What is the date of birth of the baptized individual?
schema.date_of_baptism: What was the date of baptism?
schema.place_of_baptism_church: What is the name of the church or place of baptism?
schema.place_of_baptism_city_state: In which city and state did the baptism take place?
schema.officiating_minister_name: What is the full name of the officiating minister?
schema.parent_1_full_name: What is the full name of Parent/Guardian 1?
schema.parent_2_full_name: What is the full name of Parent/Guardian 2 (if applicable)?
schema.godparent_1_full_name: What is the full name of Godparent/Sponsor 1?
schema.godparent_2_full_name: What is the full name of Godparent/Sponsor 2 (if applicable)?

description: A record-keeping document used to track scores and performance during a game of golf or bowling.

schema.game_type: What type of game was played (e.g., Golf, Bowling)?
schema.date_of_game: What was the date of the game?
schema.location_name: What is the name of the golf course or bowling alley?
schema.player_1_name: What is the full name of Player 1?
schema.player_2_name: What is the full name of Player 2?
schema.player_3_name: What is the full name of Player 3?
schema.player_4_name: What is the full name of Player 4?

description: A legal document granting permission from a model to a photographer or entity to use their likeness in various media.

schema.model_full_name: What is the model's full legal name?
schema.model_address: What is the model's current address?
schema.model_phone_number: What is the model's primary phone number?
schema.model_email: What is the model's email address?
schema.model_date_of_birth: What is the model's date of birth?
schema.photographer_company_name: What is the name of the photographer or company acquiring the release?
schema.date_of_shoot: What was the date(s) of the photography or videography session?
schema.description_of_usage: For what purpose will the images/footage be used (e.g., commercial, editorial, web, print)?
schema.date_of_signature: What is the date of signing this release?

description: A portion of a raffle ticket that the participant retains as proof of entry for a drawing.

schema.raffle_name_event: What is the name of the raffle or event?
schema.ticket_number: What is the ticket number (for participant's reference)?
schema.participant_full_name: What is the participant's full name?
schema.participant_phone_number: What is the participant's primary phone number?
schema.participant_email_address: What is the participant's email address?
schema.date_of_drawing: When is the drawing scheduled to take place?
schema.prize_description: What is the main prize or a description of potential prizes?
schema.organization_hosting_raffle: Which organization is hosting this raffle?

description: A form used to collect details about a culinary recipe for contests, publications, or shared collections.

schema.recipe_name: What is the exact name of your recipe?
schema.cuisine_type: What cuisine type best describes your recipe (e.g., Italian, Mexican, American)?
schema.dish_type: What type of dish is this (e.g., Appetizer, Main Course, Dessert, Beverage)?
schema.preparation_time_minutes: How many minutes does it take to prepare?
schema.cook_time_minutes: How many minutes does it take to cook?
schema.number_of_servings: How many servings does this recipe yield?
schema.ingredients_list: Please list all ingredients with quantities (e.g., 1 cup flour, 2 eggs).

description: A legal document acknowledging the risks of tattooing and granting permission for the procedure.

schema.client_full_name: What is the client's full legal name?
schema.date_of_birth: What is the client's date of birth?
schema.tattoo_design_description: Please describe the tattoo design, size, and specific colors.
schema.tattoo_placement: Where on the body will the tattoo be placed?
schema.medical_conditions: Do you have any existing medical conditions or allergies?
schema.medications: Are you currently taking any medications, including blood thinners?
schema.signature: Client's signature confirming understanding and consent.

description: A record used by divers to document details of their underwater dives for safety and experience tracking.

schema.dive_number: What is the sequential number for this dive?
schema.date_of_dive: When did this dive take place?
schema.dive_location: What is the general location of the dive?
schema.dive_site_name: What is the specific name of the dive site?
schema.entry_time: What time did you enter the water?
schema.bottom_time_minutes: What was the total time spent at the maximum depth, in minutes?
schema.max_depth_feet: What was the maximum depth reached during the dive, in feet?
schema.water_temperature_f: What was the water temperature at depth in Fahrenheit?
schema.visibility_feet: What was the estimated underwater visibility in feet?
schema.marine_life_sighted: List any significant marine life observed.

description: A legal document used to meticulously record the transfer of evidence or samples to maintain their integrity and admissibility.

schema.case_number: What is the associated case or incident number?
schema.item_description: Provide a detailed description of the item or evidence.
schema.collection_date_time: When and at what time was the item collected?
schema.transfer_date_time: When and at what time was the item transferred?
schema.reason_for_transfer: What is the reason for this transfer?
schema.item_condition: Describe the condition of the item upon transfer.
schema.signature_transferor: Signature of the individual transferring the item.

description: A formal request submitted to a local authority to obtain permission for filming activities in a public or private location.

schema.production_company_name: What is the name of the production company?
schema.project_title: What is the title of the film or project?
schema.applicant_contact_person: Who is the primary contact person for this application?
schema.contact_phone_number: What is the primary contact phone number?
schema.contact_email_address: What is the primary contact email address?
schema.proposed_filming_dates: What are the proposed start and end dates for filming?
schema.primary_filming_location: What is the primary filming location address?
schema.estimated_crew_size: What is the estimated number of cast and crew members on site?
schema.equipment_list_summary: Provide a brief summary of major equipment (e.g., cranes, generators).
schema.special_requests_notes: Are there any special requests or considerations?

description: A legal document submitted to a government patent office seeking exclusive rights for an invention.

schema.applicant_name: What is the full legal name of the applicant or assignee?
schema.invention_title: What is the official title of the invention?
schema.abstract_summary: Provide a brief abstract summarizing the invention (max 150 words).
schema.detailed_description_reference: Reference to the detailed description section of the application.
schema.claims_reference: Reference to the claims section of the application.
schema.inventor_full_name: What is the full legal name of the inventor(s)?
schema.filing_date: What is the official filing date of this application?
schema.prior_art_references: List any relevant prior art documents or patents.
